settings.title: AI Supervisor
settings.subtitle: Set the name of your digital site supervisor. This is just a personalization layer without unnecessary options.
settings.previewBubble: Hi, I’m {{name}}. I’ll help you keep track of the budget, stages, and the most important things on site.
settings.avatarInfo: Currently, 1 avatar is available. More variants can be added in the future.
settings.savedMessage: AI supervisor settings have been saved.

errors.load: Failed to load AI supervisor settings
errors.nameTooLong: Name can have up to 30 characters

onboarding.title:
Meet your
construction supervisor
onboarding.subtitle: Give them a name and they’ll support you throughout the whole build.

feature1.title: Budget analysis
feature1.desc: Reviews your spending and warns you when something looks wrong.

feature2.title: Smart alerts
feature2.desc: Proactively reaches out when something important is happening.

feature3.title: Keeps the schedule on track
feature3.desc: Reminds you about tasks and tracks stage progress.

feature4.title: Always available
feature4.desc: Ask about anything related to the build and get an answer right away.

onboarding.proNote: At launch, the AI supervisor is available to all users. Paid plans will arrive in a future update.

quickQuestions.q2: Which stage are we in now?

messages.loadDataError: Hi! I couldn't load the data. Please try again.
messages.emptyHistoryIntro: Hi! I'm ready. Ask me about budget, stages, schedule, or anything related to the build.
messages.newConversationStarted: A new conversation has started. What would you like to ask?
messages.connectionError: Sorry, a connection error occurred. Please try again.
